title: IOLabel$ Function
parameters:
IOType	Integer expression
		 representing the type of I/O.

		0 - Input

1 - Output

2 - Memory

IOWidth	Integer expression
		 representing the width of the port: 1(bit), 8 (byte), or 16 (word).

portNumber	Integer expression
		 representing the bit, byte, or word port number to return the
		 label for.
description:
IOLabel$ Function

IOLabel$ Function

See Also Example

Returns the I/O label for a specified input or output bit, byte, or word.
see_also:
PLabel$

IONumber

IOLabel$ Function Example

Integer i

For i = 0 To 15

  Print "Input ", i, ": ", IOLabel$(0, 1, i)

Next i
